name: Calcirol / Cholecalciferol 60000IU
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
uses: Bone pain and muscle weakness from deficiency
how_it_works: Fat-soluble vitamin that is hydroxylated in liver and kidney to form active 1,25-dihydroxyvitamin D3 (calcitriol), which regulates calcium and phosphate absorption from gut.
food_interactions: Take with a fatty meal for best absorption
Avoid excessive dairy if taking high doses (calcium overload)
what_to_avoid: Do not take more than prescribed — fat-soluble and can accumulate
Check 25-OH Vitamin D level before starting high doses
